description: You are logged into Redmine as an administrator. Your task is to configure a secure role for an external client, Jordan Lee, to participate in the 'Mobile Banking App' project. Create a new role named 'External Reviewer' with Issues visibility set to 'Issues created by or assigned to the user', Time logs visibility set to 'None', and Users visibility set to 'Members of visible projects'. The role must only have permissions for View issues, Add issues, Add notes, and View files. Assign Jordan Lee to the 'Mobile Banking App' project with this 'External Reviewer' role.
